setting: Contemporary everyday life — modern homes, phones and screens, workplaces, daily routines, social media and consumer culture; ordinary moments like waking up, commuting, work, relationships, and household responsibilities where faith choices are made daily.
spiritual_theme: Putting God first through daily surrender — prioritizing God above idols (money, success, approval), cultivating prayer and Scripture, trusting and obeying God, spiritual growth and transformation over 30 days.
emotional_palette: Hopeful, convicting, peaceful, transformative and encouraging — a mix of gentle urgency, spiritual clarity, freedom from anxiety, growing faith, and deepening intimacy with God.
